entry.title: RES26-132 (Honolulu): INTRO → CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF TUITION, TRAVEL, AND RELATED EXPENSES, VALUED AT $3,000, TO THE CITY FROM THE AMERICAN ASSOCIATION OF MOTOR VEHICLE ADMINISTRATORS (AAMVA) FOR A REPRESENTATIVE FROM THE DEPARTMENT OF CUSTOMER SERVICES TO ATTEND THE 2026 AAMVA REGION 4 CONFERENCE FROM JULY 21 - JULY 23, 2026, IN COLORADO SPRINGS, COLORADO.

Status: INTRO → CCL

Latest action: Adopted.

View on the council site
